retrieved_result: What does Dipak mean? 'Dipak' is a male name meaning 'little lamp' and is an alternate spelling of Deepak (Hindi, Sanskrit); associated with author Deepak Chopra. Variations include Dapak and Dipaki; middle name pairings include Dipak Adrien (D. A.).
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the meaning of the name Dipak and contains no information about TikTok trends or 2024 trends, thus not relevant to the query.
